items.headline: Albemarle raised to Buy at Citi with 'underappreciated' growth opportunities ahead
items.snippet: On June 18, Citi upgraded ALB to Buy, price target $225. RBC raised PT to $257, Outperform. Lithium supply expected tight through 2027.

items.headline: Energy storage demand grows 40% annually, lithium producers bet on growth drivers beyond EVs
items.snippet: Grid energy storage demand growing steadily. Global ESS production to reach ~950 GWh in 2026, +35% YoY. Albemarle CCO: 'Grid energy storage is more evenly distributed globally.'

items.headline: Does Albemarle's Premium Valuation Justify Buying the Stock Now?
items.snippet: ALB expects lithium demand CAGR 10-20% 2025-2030. Q1 2026 Energy Storage sales volumes +14% YoY. Lithium prices rebounding from 2025 lows. 2026 EPS consensus $12.39, +1668% YoY.
